table_mapping.description: Shared header table for quotation, sales order, invoice and related sales documents.

field_mapping.description: ERP document tag such as sal_soe or sal_inv.

field_mapping.synonyms: document number, so no, invoice no

field_mapping.description: Main transaction date used for month filters.
Filter n when the column is available.
Approved documents use y when required by the report.

join_relationship.join_condition: d.uniquenum_pri = m.uniquenum_pri AND d.tag_table_usage = m.tag_table_usage AND d.companyfn = m.companyfn

mandatory_fields.rule: not deleted when column is available
must be fixed by selected report
mandatory_fields.description: Separates SO, invoice, quotation and delivery documents.

mandatory_fields.rule: date range required for list queries
mandatory_fields.description: Keeps queries bounded on large sales tables.

business_rules.rule_expression: Always filter by session masterfn and companyfn.

business_rules.description: Default report behavior excludes void documents.
Used when the user asks for approved/posted documents.

business_rules.rule_expression: tag_wflow_app_yn is empty or not equal to 'y'
business_rules.description: Used when the user asks for draft/unapproved documents.

business_rules.rule_expression: Do not render masterfn, companyfn, uniquenum_pri, party_unique, staff_unique.
List queries require date range and max limit.

sql_templates.sql_template: SELECT dnum_auto, date_trans, party_code, party_desc, staff_desc, curr_short_forex, amount_forex, amount_local FROM scm_sal_main WHERE masterfn = :masterfn AND companyfn = :companyfn AND tag_table_usage = 'sal_soe' AND tag_void_yn = 'n' AND date_trans >= :date_from AND date_trans < :date_to ORDER BY date_trans DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
sql_templates.parameters: masterfn, companyfn, date_from, date_to, limit, offset

sql_templates.sql_template: SELECT dnum_auto, date_trans, party_code, party_desc, staff_desc, curr_short_forex, amount_forex, amount_local FROM scm_sal_main WHERE masterfn = :masterfn AND companyfn = :companyfn AND tag_table_usage = 'sal_inv' AND tag_void_yn = 'n' AND date_trans >= :date_from AND date_trans < :date_to ORDER BY date_trans DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
sql_templates.parameters: masterfn, companyfn, date_from, date_to, limit, offset

sql_templates.sql_template: SELECT dnum_auto, date_trans, party_code, party_desc, amount_local FROM scm_sal_main WHERE masterfn = :masterfn AND companyfn = :companyfn AND tag_table_usage = 'sal_soe' AND tag_void_yn = 'n' AND date_trans >= :date_from AND date_trans < :date_to ORDER BY amount_local DESC LIMIT :limit
sql_templates.notes: Top sales orders by local amount.

sql_templates.sql_template: SELECT party_code, party_desc, SUM(amount_local) AS total_amount_local, COUNT(*) AS document_count FROM scm_sal_main WHERE masterfn = :masterfn AND companyfn = :companyfn AND tag_table_usage = 'sal_inv' AND tag_void_yn = 'n' AND date_trans >= :date_from AND date_trans < :date_to GROUP BY party_code, party_desc ORDER BY total_amount_local DESC LIMIT :limit
sql_templates.notes: Sales invoice amount grouped by customer.

permissions.rule_expression: masterfn and companyfn must be injected from session.
Default limit is 20; maximum limit is 100 unless explicitly approved.
Do not expose masterfn, companyfn, uniquenum_pri, party_unique, staff_unique.

sample_questions.user_question: which document numbers are sales orders in 7/2026

engine_components.responsibility: Detect sales intent, date ranges, entity names, list/count/top/aggregate wording.
Select report, tool, required filters and allowed output columns.
Load Sales skill/tool contracts from skills/globe3-* modules.
Generate SELECT-only queries from selected skill/report templates.
Reject unsafe SQL and hidden internal output columns.
Enforce masterfn/companyfn/company scope and row limits.
Execute approved read-only sales data queries.
Render business labels and concise chat/table result.
Log ingest runs, learned questions and user feedback.
